scope: Priority screen of the next 500 pending no-anchor players after batch 019, covering source rows 1997-2496. Includes only researched candidates whose shared calibrated projected BBPR clears 60.
method: Start from pending players after source row 1996 with current-team values and no completed projection.
Screen the first 500 remaining pending rows, source rows 1997 through 2496.
Skip players who do not clear 60 BBPR under the shared calibration after a scored historical anchor is assigned.
For every selected no-anchor row, assign a researched historicalRating from official roster, production, recruiting, and current sentiment context.
Use official team pages first, then reputable stat or team/local coverage when historical production or current role sentiment is needed.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same calibration formulas used by the admin apply path.
Leave every row pending admin approval so source context can be reviewed before application.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, health, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

screeningSummary.excludedReason: Remaining screened rows either lacked enough sourced role/production signal, were crowded low-minute freshmen/internationals, had health/redshirt concerns, or calibrated at 60 BBPR or below. Casey Jones was specifically left out because the current Washington State context pointed to a redshirt/availability issue.

players.researchSummary: Jasper Johnson receives a 54 anchor from a Kentucky freshman season plus top-recruit context before moving to Oregon. The scoring pedigree, high-major transfer path, and sophomore development score push him well above 60 without treating the limited freshman role as a permanent discount.

teamContext.starterEvidence: Oregon context and sourced roster/production evidence support a yes starter label for this screening pass.
teamContext.scoredAnchor: Synthetic historical anchor: 54. This is used only because the projection export had no historical BBPR for the row.
teamContext.roleCap: Selected because the same shared calibration projects above 60 BBPR; screened rows at 60 or below were intentionally left out.
teamContext.positionCompetition: Oregon's G minutes should be reviewed against returning contributors, portal additions, freshmen, and health before applying the suggestion.

evidence.notes: Official roster verifies Johnson on Oregon's current men's basketball roster.
Stat page captures his Kentucky freshman sample, which is used as context rather than a hard cap.
Source row 2009 has no imported historical BBPR, so this batch assigns a scored anchor of 54 before projection.
